items.q: How do I apply for hostel accommodation?
items.a: Apply through the Accommodation Office portal within the first 10 days of admission. Rooms are allocated on a first-come basis; priority is given to out-of-district students.

items.q: What is included in hostel fees?
items.a: Hostel fees cover the room, electricity, water, and common area maintenance. Meals are separate and can be purchased via the cafeteria meal plan.
Yes — submit a joint roommate request through the portal before the allocation deadline. Requests received after allocation starts can't be guaranteed.
